name: Christopher Mellon
summary: Former Deputy Assistant Secretary of Defense for Intelligence and former Senate Intelligence Committee staff director who has advocated for congressional UAP oversight.

relationships.role: Former Deputy Assistant Secretary of Defense for Intelligence

profileStatus: Former government official and public disclosure advocate
profileSummary: Former Deputy Assistant Secretary of Defense for Intelligence and former Senate Intelligence Committee staff director who has advocated for congressional UAP oversight.
background: Former Deputy Assistant Secretary of Defense for Intelligence and former Minority Staff Director of the Senate Intelligence Committee.
inclusionNote: Included because of his former defense and congressional-intelligence roles, public advocacy for UAP oversight, and involvement in bringing military UAP reporting to congressional attention.
